NAT
Correct answer: 3.8
Solution

3.8 (3.7 - 3.9)

(Rounded off to two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 33.33
Solution

33.33 (32.50 - 34.50)

Q14 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A full wave rectifier produces rms voltage of 10 V from a 50 Hz line source and feeds a resistive load of 1100 Ω. If the filter uses a capacitance C = 50 μF, the resulting output ripple factor is _____. (Rounded of to two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.052
Solution

0.052 (0.049 - 0.055)

NAT
Correct answer: 129.16
Solution

129.16 (129.10 - 129.30)
